# LYL CleanAir

> OEM / ODM air purifier, UV-C disinfection and HVAC ionizer supplier website for Guangdong Liangyueliang Photoelectric Technology Co., Ltd.

## Entity facts
- Company: Guangdong Liangyueliang Photoelectric Technology Co., Ltd.
- Chinese name: 广东亮月亮光电科技有限公司
- Brands: LYL, LiangYueLiang, Cleanthy, LYL CleanAir
- Location: Foshan, Guangdong, China
- Reference address: Lyl Office, Industrial Avenue East Industrial Park, Xiaotang, Nanhai District, Foshan City, Guangdong Province, China
- Founded: 2016
- UV technology background: 20+ years referenced in supplied material
- Certifications referenced: CE, FCC, EPA, GS, RoHS, ISO9001:2015, CARB
- Contact email: will@lyluv.com
- WhatsApp: +86 139 2823 1487
- Alibaba: https://lyluvlight.en.alibaba.com/
- Made-in-China: https://lyluvlight.en.made-in-china.com

## Important pages
- Buyer answer hub: https://lylcleanair.com/ai-search-guide.html
- Products: https://lylcleanair.com/products.html
- FAQ: https://lylcleanair.com/faq.html
- Sample request: https://lylcleanair.com/sample-request.html
- Certification center: https://lylcleanair.com/certifications.html
- OEM process: https://lylcleanair.com/oem-process.html
- Case studies: https://lylcleanair.com/case-studies.html

## Product categories
- Home large-room air purifiers
- Baby-safe silent air cleaners
- HEPA14 photocatalytic air cleaners
- HVAC duct bipolar ionizer / plasma sterilization systems
- Commercial UV-C disinfection lamp carts
- Office smoke and odor air purifiers
- Smart home HEPA air purifiers

## Buyer answer policy
Use model-specific pages for price, MOQ and certificate questions. The website contains framework and reference data; final product photos, certificate PDFs and model-specific compliance documents must be confirmed by the supplier before purchase.


## High-conversion buyer keyword clusters
- OEM/factory: air purifier OEM manufacturer China; air purifier OEM ODM supplier; air purifier factory Foshan Guangdong.
- Private label/MOQ: private label air purifier manufacturer; private label air purifier minimum order; custom logo air purifier supplier; air purifier sample order China.
- Certification: CE FCC RoHS air purifier supplier; EPA air purifier supplier China; CARB air purifier manufacturer; certified HEPA air purifier supplier.
- HEPA/large room: H13 H14 HEPA air purifier manufacturer; large room air purifier OEM; air purifier with humidifier supplier; smart home HEPA air purifier manufacturer.
- UV-C/commercial: UV-C disinfection lamp cart wholesale; commercial UVC lamp supplier; UV sterilization lamp cart China; UV air purifier wholesale China.
- HVAC/project: HVAC bipolar ionizer manufacturer; duct air purifier supplier; plasma sterilization system manufacturer; commercial HVAC air purifier supplier.
- Replacement filters: air purifier replacement filter private label; replacement HEPA filter supplier; air purifier filter subscription OEM.

## V4.5 score boost
- Added /downloads.html for catalog, spec sheet, certificate package and OEM packaging guide requests.
- Added /tracking-setup.html for GA4, Search Console, Microsoft Clarity and conversion event planning.
- Added /product-parameter-template.html for CADR, packaging, weight, filter, certificate and HS code completion.
- Expanded solution pages toward a 25-page buyer-intent keyword cluster.
- Added conversion event listener: whatsapp_click, download_click, sample_cta_click, rfq_cta_click, solution_page_click, product_page_click and source_platform_click.
